title: Arrambam
subTitle: Ashok, a former member of the ATS, along with Arjun, a computer hacker, and his girlfriend Anitha, tries to unveil a scam involving the bulletproof jackets provided to police officers.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: USA Weekly News
subTitle: The host presents the latest social and economic news stories about the Malayali diaspora in the USA, along with updates on various cultural events and interviews.

title: Radhakrishna
subTitle: When the forest department takes away the elephant, the child is left without his dearest friend. The young boy undertakes a journey to find the lost animal.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Pokkiri Raja
subTitle: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

title: Singam II
subTitle: Durai Singam, a policeman working an undercover operation, attempts to eliminate a drug trafficking ring in the coastal town of Thoothukudi.

title: Mersal
subTitle: Maaran, a doctor, is falsely arrested for the murder of his colleague, Dr Arjun Zachariah. He soon discovers that the real culprit is a lookalike who aims to expose corruption in the medical industry.

title: Straw Man Murder Case
subTitle: Forensic expert Song Ci investigates a chilling case where a family is mysteriously transformed into straw men. He defies imperial pressure and sabotage to uncover a massive hidden conspiracy.

title: Chess
subTitle: A man murders his rich brother-in-law with the help of three co-conspirators to amass his wealth. He also manages to discredit the deceased man's illegitimate son.

title: Kochi Rajavu
subTitle: Unni and Ashwathy's life takes a turn after he accidentally kills her cousin in a tussle. After spending time in prison, he moves to Chennai with his family, hoping to start a fresh chapter, but his past catches up with him.

title: Kuruvi

title: Pon Manickavel
subTitle: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the life of high profile persons are threatened.

title: Transit 17
subTitle: A team of resistance soldiers is on a mission to save humanity from the grips of a deadly virus and protect a girl who might lead them to the cure.

title: Chakra
subTitle: A carefully planned mass robbery causes a police officer and a soldier to team up with each other and carry out an investigation, which reveals a vast syndicate of cybercriminals.

subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: PK
subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.
